backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state, serving as a placeholder entry point.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the AppPreviewSection.tsx CTA button was updated to display 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' linking to 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D' in a new tab.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing each component's purpose and notable content.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based light and dark theme CSS custom properties for colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with page title 'Poppo Live Agency', meta description, og:site_name tag, and a root div that mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full landing page by rendering Navbar, HeroSection, FeaturesSection, AppPreviewSection, HowItWorksSection, StatsSection, and Footer in a dark-themed wrapper.
frontend/src/components/AppPreviewSectio: Split-layout section showcasing app features with a CTA anchor labeled 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' linking to 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D' (opens in new tab), plus App Store and Google Play download badges.
Renders a six-card grid highlighting Poppo Live features (Go Live, Earn Rewards, Gifts, Voice Calls, PK Battles, Global Community) with icon images and hover gradient accents.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-page footer with the Poppo Live Agency logo, navigation link columns, social media icons, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a headline, a 'Become Poppo Agent' CTA linking to 'https://invite-vone.com/zearDh', a WhatsApp button, and App Store/Google Play download badges.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Renders a 4-step 'How It Works' section explaining how to download, register, stream, and earn on Poppo Live, displayed in a responsive grid with animated circles and a CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, WhatsApp and Apply Now CTA buttons, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/StatsSection.tsx: Displays animated community statistics (users, countries, streams, creators) that count up on scroll into view, along with a testimonial quote block.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for the static landing page.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollPosition.ts: Simple hook that tracks and returns the current vertical scroll position using a passive scroll event listener.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining brand color tokens, dark-theme CSS variables, Tailwind layers, and reusable utility classes for gradients, glow shadows, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and InternetIdentityProvider providers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), fonts, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling dark mode via class. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording one existing feature that updates a CTA button in AppPreviewSection.tsx to display 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' with a new invite link href.
